name: PER_DIAG_BKP_ROWS
description: Generic backup table for Customer Self Service Data Integrity.

columns.Name: TEST_ID
columns.Comments: FND test id

columns.Name: EXECUTION_ID
columns.Comments: FND test execution id

columns.Name: RUN_NAME
columns.Comments: FND test run name

columns.Name: EXECUTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the test was executed

columns.Name: EXECUTION_BY
columns.Comments: Username of the person who executed the test

columns.Name: RUN_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of test execution

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments

columns.Name: XML_DATA
columns.Comments: XML representation of the backup table row

columns.Name: OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: Table name (Index will be created on OBJECT_NAME and SKID)

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SKID
columns.Comments: SKID to store surrogate key of the transaction table. (Index will be created on OBJECT_NAME and SKID)

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: enterprise id

columns.Name: PVAL001
columns.Comments: Additional VARCHAR2 column. Teams can use this columns as per their requirements

columns.Comments: Additional VARCHAR2 column. Teams can use this columns as per their requirements

columns.Comments: Additional VARCHAR2 column. Teams can use this columns as per their requirements
